content:
- Continued bug task .ralph/tasks/bugs/real-binary-tests-fail-when-port-allocation-is-blocked.md from TO BE VERIFIED.
- Ran deep skeptical verification and updated plan (added no-panic test refactor and deterministic repeat-loop requirements), switched marker to NOW EXECUTE.
- Re-ran listed repros and full make test with evidence capture under .ralph/evidence/real-binary-tests-fail-when-port-allocation-is-blocked-20260302.
- Observed mismatch vs original bug narrative: targeted allocate_ports repros passed; full make test failed once in pginfo standby test at connect-to-primary (mode B startup/connect race).
- Refactored panic-style tests to Result-based flow in src/test_harness/ports.rs, src/test_harness/etcd3.rs, and src/pginfo/worker.rs.
- Added bounded postgres readiness probe helper in pginfo worker tests before first SQL workload to stabilize full-suite startup race.
- Kept reservation semantics intact: release reserved ports immediately before process spawn/start.
- Validation completed: targeted tests passed, 5x repeat loops passed for flaky-prone tests, and required gates all passed (make check/test/test-bdd/lint).
- Updated bug task file to done/true with findings + fix summary, appended new cross-app learnings to AGENTS.md, ran /bin/bash .ralph/task_switch.sh successfully.
- Next immediate step is commit all changes with evidence-rich message and then quit.

- Reviewed .ralph/current_tasks.md and identified all non-passing tasks (passes=false, currently all not_started except one done bug).
- Verified there are no literal <status>planning</status> entries in task files; interpreted planning set as non-passing + not_started tasks.
- Focused audit on planning tasks for user-requested scope: larger scenario tests / bdd / e2e with full implementation and real environment.
- Confirmed task 13 explicitly includes e2e multi-node real HA scenario matrix with real PG16 + etcd3 + running node processes and acceptance criterion for at least 3 concurrent nodes.
- Confirmed related supporting planning tasks: 12 (integration loop behavior), 14 (security/TLS real cluster), 15 (final e2e/integration quality gate), 10b (real etcd3 DCS adapter prerequisite).
- Noted gap: planning tasks mostly require running make test-bdd, but do not explicitly require authoring new BDD feature files for the 3-node scenarios.
- Next if asked: propose exact task text additions to make BDD creation and 3 connected-node assertions explicit.

- Read .ralph/current_tasks.md and evaluated unfinished tasks per Choose-Task rules.
- Confirmed there are active bug tasks (<passes>false</passes>) and no <passes>meta-task</passes> entries in summary.
- Selected .ralph/tasks/bugs/process-worker-real-job-tests-state-channel-closed.md as next task because it impacts five failing real-job tests (higher immediate failure surface than the single pginfo fixture failure).
- Wrote only that path to .ralph/current_task.txt and stopped.

- Started by reading prior progress memory and current task pointer from .ralph/current_task.txt.
- Opened bug task .ralph/tasks/bugs/process-worker-real-job-tests-state-channel-closed.md.
- Ran parallel research scans on process worker real-job tests, state watch channel implementation, and publish failure surfaces.
- Confirmed failure message source is process worker publish wrapper over state::watch send when subscriber count drops to zero.
- Wrote a full detailed implementation plan into the bug task file and appended TO BE VERIFIED exactly as requested.
- Did not execute fixes yet by design; stopping immediately at planning stage per workflow.
- Next invocation should perform deep skeptical verification, alter at least one plan item, and switch marker to NOW EXECUTE.

- Performed deep codebase review without running tests; focused on test reality, silent-pass risks, and code smells.
- Scanned test harness, process/pginfo worker tests, contract tests, and DCS watch path; identified multiple gaps where tests can pass despite real failures and where errors are silently ignored.
- Created bug tasks for process real-binary tests accepting failure outcomes, worker contract tests lacking behavioral assertions, DCS refresh errors being ignored, and test harness binary checks panicking.
- Added a larger task to build real HA+DCS+Process integration tests using real PG16/etcd binaries.
- Next: hand off to an agent to implement the bugs/tasks or prioritize which should be tackled first.
